grades.title: Grade 1 - Seedlight Plains
grades.theme: The player restores a foggy village by learning to count, compare, combine, and sort the world.
grades.level_progression_style: Very short guided stages with low palette size and visible counting groups.
tutorial_progression: show one idea at a time
teach with feedback after the move
name the term after the mechanic is experienced
grades.boss_role: Checks that the player can read and act on a mixed set of early math goals.

chapters.title: Counting Village
chapters.theme: Objects separate into countable groups and the village square becomes readable.

units.title: See and Count 1-3
units.learning_goal: Match visible groups to numbers 1 to 3.

units.title: More and Less
units.learning_goal: Notice which value is bigger or smaller.

units.title: Count to 5
units.learning_goal: Read and collect groups up to 5.

units.title: Mixed Counting Challenge
units.learning_goal: Use quick counting in a busier board.

restoration_tasks.title: Restore Number Square
restoration_tasks.description: The plaza tiles now separate objects into neat countable spaces.

restoration_tasks.title: Hang Lantern Rows
restoration_tasks.description: Street lanterns glow in clear repeating groups.

restoration_tasks.title: Open Counting Market
restoration_tasks.description: Every stall shows tidy sets and visible prices.

chapters.title: Addition Bridge
chapters.theme: Separated stones join into visible sums and support a bridge.

units.title: Join Small Groups
units.learning_goal: See addition as combining matched values.

units.title: Reach Friendly Totals
units.learning_goal: Build sums that feel useful and fast.

units.title: Bridge Mastery
units.learning_goal: Use bigger matches and efficient move use.

restoration_tasks.title: Raise Bridge Pillars
restoration_tasks.description: Stone supports rise as sums become stable.

restoration_tasks.title: Complete the Main Arch
restoration_tasks.description: Balanced sums hold the bridge together.

restoration_tasks.title: Open the Trade Route
restoration_tasks.description: Travelers cross when the bridge is fully restored.

chapters.title: Multiplication Workshop
chapters.theme: Equal rows of beams, crates, and tools rebuild the workshop through repeated groups.

units.title: Equal Groups
units.learning_goal: See multiplication as repeated equal groups.

units.title: Array Frames
units.learning_goal: Read rows and columns as structured groups.

restoration_tasks.title: Raise Array Frames
restoration_tasks.description: Equal rows of beams turn the yard into a true workshop.

restoration_tasks.title: Stack Repeating Crates
restoration_tasks.description: Supplies line up into repeatable groups.

restoration_tasks.title: Open the Array Foundry
restoration_tasks.description: The workshop now rebuilds structures through equal groups.

chapters.title: Subtraction Garden
chapters.theme: Overgrown spaces are cleared by taking away groups.

units.title: Take Away
units.learning_goal: See subtraction as removal from a whole.

units.title: Find the Difference
units.learning_goal: Compare two visible quantities.

chapters.title: Shape Town
chapters.theme: Roads and rooftops are rebuilt through pattern and shape clearing.

units.title: Basic Shapes
units.learning_goal: Notice squares, triangles, and circles through board goals.

units.title: Simple Measure
units.learning_goal: Measure paths with repeated units.

grades.title: Grade 2 - Clockwork Harbor
grades.theme: The harbor runs on bigger numbers, repeated sums, time, money, and measured routes.
grades.level_progression_style: Introduce larger values, quicker arithmetic, and short planning sequences.
tutorial_progression: mix two objective types by the chapter boss
grades.boss_role: Mixed arithmetic fluency stage with multiple goals.

chapters.title: Place Value Pier
chapters.theme: Bigger numbers become organized into readable bundles.

units.title: Tens and Ones
units.learning_goal: Group tiles into tens and ones.

units.title: Bigger and Smaller
units.learning_goal: Compare two larger values.

chapters.title: Harbor Exchange
chapters.theme: Cargo is combined and removed quickly.

units.title: Fast Sums
units.learning_goal: Build totals efficiently.

units.title: Take Away Loads
units.learning_goal: Reduce to exact targets.

chapters.title: Array Docks
chapters.theme: Repeated groups prepare the player for multiplication.

units.title: Equal Rows
units.learning_goal: Build repeated groups.

units.title: Coins and Prices
units.learning_goal: Use groups to read money values.

chapters.title: Schedule Street
chapters.theme: Paths, clocks, and prices make the district run on measurement.

units.title: Length and Time
units.learning_goal: Fill routes using unit steps and clock targets.

units.title: Simple Figures
units.learning_goal: Notice rectangle and line properties through board clears.

grades.title: Grade 3 - Fraction Fields
grades.theme: Farms, fences, and charts turn arithmetic into grouped production and sharing.
grades.level_progression_style: Longer cascades, stronger board planning, and first part-whole mechanics.
tutorial_progression: then compare different ways to reach the same result
grades.boss_role: Tests whether the player can switch between grouping and sharing objectives.

chapters.title: Harvest Arrays
chapters.theme: Crops grow in equal rows.

units.title: Rows and Columns
units.learning_goal: See multiplication as equal arrays.

units.title: Times Table Harvest
units.learning_goal: Recognize common repeated groups fast.

restoration_tasks.title: Restore Harvest Rows
restoration_tasks.description: Crop beds are laid out in equal rows so groups become visible.

restoration_tasks.title: Open the Array Barn
restoration_tasks.description: Crates and tools line up in repeatable columns.

restoration_tasks.title: Raise Times Table Board
restoration_tasks.description: The district now records repeated groups as stable multiplication patterns.

chapters.title: Sharing Barn
chapters.theme: Supplies must be split evenly.

units.title: Equal Sharing
units.learning_goal: Make fair groups.

units.title: Sharing Leftovers
units.learning_goal: Notice when groups do not split evenly yet.

chapters.title: Fraction Orchard
chapters.theme: Whole fruits split into equal parts.

units.title: Parts of One Whole
units.learning_goal: Build one whole from equal parts.

units.title: Same Whole, Different Parts
units.learning_goal: Compare basic fractions visually.

chapters.title: Fence and Ledger
chapters.theme: Perimeter and data turn the farm into a working district.

units.title: Perimeter Paths
units.learning_goal: Trace border lengths.

units.title: Picture Tables
units.learning_goal: Collect and compare values like a chart.

grades.title: Grade 4 - Decimal Observatory
grades.theme: A highland observatory is rebuilt with larger numbers, angles, area, graphs, and first decimals.
grades.level_progression_style: Use board overlays, shape zones, and two-step planning.
tutorial_progression: let the player manipulate before naming
introduce overlays after basics are stable
grades.boss_role: Checks transfer between number operations and spatial reasoning.

chapters.title: Thousand Terrace
chapters.theme: Big values become organized and readable.

units.title: Large Number Bundles
units.learning_goal: Read and build larger place values.

chapters.title: Computation Workshop
chapters.theme: Machines chain larger additions and subtractions.

units.title: Chain the Operation
units.learning_goal: Work through bigger operations in chunks.

chapters.title: Decimal Springs
chapters.theme: Water flow shows fractions and decimals as related quantities.

units.title: Tenths and Hundredths
units.learning_goal: See decimals as parts of a whole.

units.title: Fractions to Decimals
units.learning_goal: Match equivalent representations.

chapters.title: Angle Plaza
chapters.theme: Area, angles, and graph patterns restore the observatory floor.

units.title: Turn and Align
units.learning_goal: Recognize angle sizes through board alignments.

units.title: Cover the Floor
units.learning_goal: Measure area by filling regions.

units.title: Pattern Graphs
units.learning_goal: Read change through chart-style goals.

grades.title: Grade 5 - Ratio Reservoir
grades.theme: The reservoir runs on precise fractions, decimals, divisors, multiples, and volume.
grades.level_progression_style: Use layered goals and more optimization pressure for 3-star play.
grades.boss_role: Mixed problem-solving stage with optimization-heavy star goals.

chapters.title: Fraction Reservoir
chapters.theme: Water basins fill in equivalent parts.

units.title: Equivalent Fractions
units.learning_goal: Build the same whole in multiple ways.

units.title: Combine Fractions
units.learning_goal: Add compatible parts to reach targets.

chapters.title: Decimal Channel
chapters.theme: Flow meters show precise decimal change.

units.title: Decimal Moves
units.learning_goal: Operate with tenths and hundredths.

chapters.title: Factor Station
chapters.theme: Machines run only when values group cleanly.

units.title: Common Factors and Multiples
units.learning_goal: Choose values that fit together.

chapters.title: Storage Dome
chapters.theme: Containers, averages, and data restore the final systems.

units.title: Volume Fill
units.learning_goal: Pack space with efficient shapes and values.

units.title: Balance the Reservoir
units.learning_goal: Move values toward a common average.

units.title: Analyze the System
units.learning_goal: Use data goals and limited moves to optimize.

grades.title: Grade 6 - Skycity of Proportion
grades.theme: The final city is restored through proportional reasoning, percentage, circle area, solid figures, average, and chance.
grades.level_progression_style: Tighter optimization, layered goals, and mastery-focused boss stages.
tutorial_progression: let mastery come from stage design
grades.boss_role: Final mastery stages combine representation switching and optimization.

chapters.title: Sharing Heights
chapters.theme: Complex sharing lifts platforms into place.

units.title: Divide Fractions
units.learning_goal: Treat division as repeated partitioning.

chapters.title: Ratio Boulevard
chapters.theme: City systems balance ingredients, speeds, and exchange rates.

units.title: Keep the Ratio
units.learning_goal: Maintain proportional balance.

units.title: Percent Signals
units.learning_goal: Read percents as filled parts of 100.

chapters.title: Circle and Tower Ward
chapters.theme: Curves and solids complete the skyline.

units.title: Circle Area
units.learning_goal: Estimate and cover circular regions.

units.title: Solid Figures
units.learning_goal: Pack and compare 3D structures through layered board zones.

chapters.title: Chance Observatory
chapters.theme: The city predicts outcomes and balances systems.

units.title: Average Balance
units.learning_goal: Move values toward a shared middle.

units.title: Likely and Unlikely
units.learning_goal: Read controlled randomness and target outcomes.
